info.title: Deposit Service API
info.description: Cross-chain deposit processing service with automatic token bridging and gas sponsorship

maxPriceDeviationBps.description: Maximum allowed price deviation in basis points for stablecoin-to-stablecoin bridges. Defaults to 200 (2%) if not set.

minAmount.description: Numeric string representing a bigint value

maxAmount.description: Numeric string representing a bigint value

DepositWhitelist.description: Per-source-chain deposit allowlist keyed by CAIP-2 chain identifiers (for example "eip155:8453"). Each key maps to allowed source tokens and optional min/max amount limits in raw token units.

address.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

factory.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

factoryData.description: Hex-encoded string (0x followed by hex characters)

sessionDigest.description: Hex-encoded string (0x followed by hex characters)

signature.description: Hex-encoded string (0x followed by hex characters)

contract.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

outputToken.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

Target.description: Destination target configuration. `chain` must be a CAIP-2 chain identifier such as "eip155:8453" or "solana:5eykt4UsFv8P8NJdTREpY1vzqKqZKvdp". When `postBridgeActions` are present, `token` is the token bridged into the smart account before those actions execute, and the last action `outputToken` becomes the final token delivered to `recipient`.

OutputTokenRule.description: Destination token routing rule. Matches deposits by source token attributes and selects the target-chain output token.

OutputTokenRuleMatch.description: Source-token match criteria. Rules may match by source chain, source token address, source symbol, or a combination.

address.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

chain.description: CAIP-2 chain identifier of the deposit (e.g. "eip155:8453")

txHash.description: Source transaction hash of the stuck deposit

account.description: Managed account address that received the deposit (EVM address or Solana public key)

token.description: Source token address. Use the zero address (0x000…000) for native transfers.

recipient.description: Address to receive the refunded tokens (EVM address or Solana public key)

amount.description: Numeric string representing a bigint value

sourceAmount.description: Numeric string representing a bigint value

destinationAmount.description: Numeric string representing a bigint value

period.description: Rolling time window for aggregated stats

salt.description: Hex-encoded string (0x followed by hex characters)

contract.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

outputToken.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

ManagedTarget.description: Destination target configuration for managed accounts. `recipient` is required and specifies the address that receives the final tokens.

smartAccount.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

factory.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

factoryData.description: Hex-encoded string (0x followed by hex characters)

sessionDigest.description: Hex-encoded string (0x followed by hex characters)

ownerAddress.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

sessionOwnerAddress.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

targetToken.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

targetChain.description: Chain identifier as a positive integer or CAIP-2 string (e.g. "eip155:8453")

recipient.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

contract.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

outputToken.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

signerAddress.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

txHash.description: Hex-encoded string (0x followed by hex characters)

chainId.description: Chain identifier as a positive integer or CAIP-2 string (e.g. "eip155:8453")

safeAddress.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

signature.description: Hex-encoded string (0x followed by hex characters)

to.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

value.description: Numeric string representing a bigint value

data.description: Hex-encoded string (0x followed by hex characters)

safeTxGas.description: Numeric string representing a bigint value

baseGas.description: Numeric string representing a bigint value

gasPrice.description: Numeric string representing a bigint value

gasToken.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

refundReceiver.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

nonce.description: Numeric string representing a bigint value

get.description: Returns all chains supported by the deposit service, with their tokens and whether they support deposits, bridging destinations, or both
Check if an account is registered and return its target chain and token if registered

schema.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

parameters.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)
parameters.name: address

post.description: Configure webhook URL, secret, sponsorship rules, and source-token whitelist rules for a client. Deposit whitelist keys must use CAIP-2 chain identifiers (for example "eip155:8453").

schema.description: API key for authentication

parameters.description: API key for authentication
parameters.name: x-api-key

schema.description: API version identifier (e.g. "2026-04.amazon"). Optional today, will become required in a future release.

parameters.description: API version identifier (e.g. "2026-04.amazon"). Optional today, will become required in a future release.
parameters.name: x-api-version

post.description: Register a new account with factory, factory data, session details, and target. `target.chain` must use a CAIP-2 chain identifier (for example "eip155:8453").

post.summary: Fetch or backfill deposit addresses for a registered account
post.description: Return the EVM, Solana, and Tron deposit addresses for an already-registered account. Missing Solana and Tron deposit addresses are backfilled on first call (derivation and Rhino.fi mint as needed) without modifying the account config (session details, target). Idempotent on repeat.

schema.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

parameters.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)
parameters.name: address

parameters.name: x-api-key

parameters.name: x-api-version

403.description: Unauthorized - API key does not belong to the client that registered the account

post.description: Retry all failed deposits for a given account address. The API key must belong to the client that registered the account.

get.summary: List deposits for the authenticated client
get.description: Returns the authenticated client's deposits, newest first. Supports filtering by account, status, source chain, and transaction hash. The `account` filter accepts an EVM address or a Solana public key (deposit address or swig address).

schema.description: EVM address (0x...) or Solana base58 public key

parameters.description: EVM address (0x...) or Solana base58 public key
parameters.name: account

schema.description: Filter by deposit status

parameters.description: Filter by deposit status
parameters.name: status

schema.description: CAIP-2 chain identifier (e.g. "eip155:8453")

parameters.description: CAIP-2 chain identifier (e.g. "eip155:8453")
parameters.name: chain

schema.description: Filter by source transaction hash (EVM 0x... or Solana base58 signature)

parameters.description: Filter by source transaction hash (EVM 0x... or Solana base58 signature)
parameters.name: txHash

schema.description: Maximum number of deposits to return

parameters.description: Maximum number of deposits to return
parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Pagination cursor. Use the `nextCursor` returned by the previous page.

parameters.description: Pagination cursor. Use the `nextCursor` returned by the previous page.
parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: When true, include spam-flagged deposits (tokens with no known price). Defaults to false.

parameters.description: When true, include spam-flagged deposits (tokens with no known price). Defaults to false.
parameters.name: includeSpam

schema.description: API key for authentication

parameters.description: API key for authentication
parameters.name: x-api-key

get.description: Returns aggregated deposit statistics (total deposits, unique depositors, and total USD volume) for the authenticated client over the requested rolling time window. Only completed deposits are counted.

schema.description: Rolling time window for aggregated stats

parameters.description: Rolling time window for aggregated stats
parameters.name: period

schema.description: API key for authentication

parameters.description: API key for authentication
parameters.name: x-api-key

200.description: Deposit statistics for the requested period

get.description: Returns a normalised token portfolio for the given address. If the address is a Solana base58 public key, the Solana portfolio is returned; otherwise the EVM portfolio is aggregated from the orchestrator's `/accounts/:address/portfolio` endpoint and priced via the price service.

parameters.description: EVM address or Solana base58 public key
parameters.name: address
